title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.209 - Roadway operation, requirements
text:
307.209.  Roadway operation, requirements. — Every person operating an electric personal assistive mobility device (EPAMD) at less than the posted speed or slower than the flow of traffic upon a street or highway shall ride as near to the right side of the roadway as safe, exercising due care when passing a standing vehicle or one proceeding in the same direction, except when making a left turn, when avoiding hazardous conditions, when the lane is too narrow to share with another vehicle, or when on a one-way street.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1270 and H.B. 2032)
